member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.Data
member.summary: Gets the value from a SharedStorage, DFF, or UserVar.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.Data.ValueType
member.summary: Defines the data types.

member.summary: Integer.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.Data.ValueType.Double
member.summary: Double.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.Data.ValueType.String
member.summary: String.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.Data.GetStringToken(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the string value from a SharedStorage, DFF, or UserVar.
member.param: Variable of holding the string token to read.
Name of the Variable holding the token to read.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.Data.GetDoubleToken(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the double value from a SharedStorage, DFF, or UserVar.
member.param: Variable of holding the string token to read.
Name of the Variable holding the token to read.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.Data.CheckDFFToken(System.String)
member.summary: Checks the DFF token string format.
member.param: Variable of holding the string token to verified.
member.returns: Returns a true if the format matches a DFF.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.Data.CheckSharedStorageToken(System.String)
member.summary: Checks the SharedStorage token string format.
member.param: Variable of holding the string token to verified.
member.returns: Returns a true if the format matches a SharedStorage.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.Data.CheckUserVarToken(System.String)
member.summary: Checks the UserVar token string format.
member.param: Variable of holding the string token to verified.
member.returns: Returns a true if the format matches a UserVar.

member.summary: Sets the string value from a SharedStorage.
member.param: Variable of holding the string token to written.
Name of the Variable holding the token to written.
String data to be set in variable.

Optype from which the data will be retrieve.

member.summary: Gets the string value DFF.
member.param: Variable of holding the string token to read.

member.summary: Gets the string value DFF.
member.param: Variable of holding the string token to read.

member.summary: Ask if the actual SC_LOCN is from SORT.
member.returns: Returns true if matching the intended location set.

member.summary: Common Reading File Functions.

member.summary: Reads a JSON File and returns the parsed object.
member.typeparam: The JSON Format to be passed against.
member.param: The JSON File with path to be parsed.
member.returns: The pasred ojbect back to the main function.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck
member.summary: Generic Regex to check and extract value.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.Caret
member.summary: Separator for user inputs.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.Colon
member.summary: Separator for user inputs.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.Comma
member.summary: Separator for user inputs.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.DffFirstChar
member.summary: First character of DFF tokens.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.Dot
member.summary: Separator for user inputs.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.Pipe
member.summary: Separator for user inputs.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.Underscore
member.summary: Separator for user inputs.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.Binary0
member.summary: A zero.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.Binary1
member.summary: A one.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.OpTypes
member.summary: Possible DFF operation types.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.Contexts
member.summary: Possible Shared Storage contexts.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.RegexsToCheck
member.summary: Delegate for process a variable in different formats.
member.param: Variable of holding the string token to read.
member.returns: Returns a true if the format matches any method in the delegate.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.IsBinaryString(System.String)
member.summary: Check if the value is a binary string.
member.param: A string that represents a binary string.
member.returns: True if it is a binary string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.IsDff(System.String)
member.summary: Check if the value is a DFF token.
member.param: A string that represents a DFF token.
member.returns: True if it is a DFF token.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.IsDffById(System.String)
member.summary: Check if the value is a DFF token without the optype.
member.param: A string that represents a DFF token without the optype.
member.returns: True if it is a DFF token without the optype.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.IsDouble(System.String)
member.summary: Check if the value is a double.
member.param: A string that represents a double.
member.returns: True if it is a double.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.IsInteger(System.String)
member.summary: Check if the value is an integer.
member.param: A string that represents an integer.
member.returns: True if it is an integer.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.IsSharedStorage(System.String)
member.summary: Check if the value is a SharedStorage key.
member.param: A string that represents a Shared Storage key.
member.returns: True if it is a Shared Storage key.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.IsUserVar(System.String)
member.summary: Check if the value is a UserVar.
member.param: A string that represents a UserVar.
member.returns: True if it is a UserVar.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Common.FormatsCheck.IsCommaSeparatedDoubleList(System.String,System.Char)
member.summary: Check if the value is a SharedStorage.
member.param: A string that represents a shared storage.
A char to split the string. The default is comma.
member.returns: True if it is a UserVar.

member.summary: Storages the ADTL config entries.

member.summary: Gets or sets the different tests for ADTL.

member.summary: Contains Kill and Predict Mode Verify and Execute.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.BelowKill
member.summary: Comparison term BELOW.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.AboveKill
member.summary: Comparison term ABOVE.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.BothKill
member.summary: Comparison term BOTH.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.sigmaTokens
member.summary: Sigma tokens dictionary.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.finalPortResult
member.summary: Sigma tokens dictionary.
Initializes a new instance of the class. Verifies Kill and Predict Mode variables from Json file.
member.param: Min and Max limits for Y component.
Min and Max limits for X component.
Print Fail on priority test (defined in json) to GSDS.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.UseAltVminToken
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether AltToken Flag is true or false.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.UseAltIDVToken
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether AltToken Flag is true or false.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.PrintSigma
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether AltToken Flag is true or false.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.PriorityGSDS
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether AltToken Flag is true or false.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.PriorityFailString
member.summary: Gets or sets the prioritized failed GSDS string.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.CurrPriorityLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets the current prioritized value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.KillString
member.summary: Gets or sets the killstring for ituff printing.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.Resolution
member.summary: Gets or sets Resolution to set in the final values.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.YMinMax
member.summary: Gets or sets Min and Max limits for Y component.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.XMinMax
member.summary: Gets or sets Min and Max limits for X component.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.LogLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets LogLevel from ADTL to print in console.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets the Session context object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.Execute
member.summary: Calculates ADTL Mode Vmin and CalcKill results.

member.summary: Prints to Ituff (STRING).

member.summary: Prints to Ituff (Double).

member.summary: Checks if SS or Uservar is in correct format.

member.summary: Expands a vector with the same values it contains.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.NormalizeCalcKillValue(Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test,System.Double)
member.summary: Normalizes the .

member.summary: Delimits a string by commas and parse it to an array of doubles.
member.param: Token key containing the data to be parsed.
member.returns: doubles array with the stored data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.VerifyFile(Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Config)
member.summary: Checks variables for vailidity.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.GenerateSigmaToken(Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test,Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables)
member.summary: Allows kill mode to push data to Sigma dictionary.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.BaseAdtlMode.GenerateFinalPortList(Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables)
member.summary: Allows kill mode to push data to ResultPort list.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.Comparators.Above
member.summary: Compare if Y input is greater than Y calcKill.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.Comparators.Below
member.summary: Compare if Y input is greater than Y calcKill.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.Comparators.Both
member.summary: Compare if Y input is greater and less than Y calcKill.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.Comparators.Compare
member.summary: Use the comparison term to call the Compare Class Above or Below.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.Comparators.Compare.Comparison(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Compare the measured against calcKill with the comparison term .

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.Comparators.ICompare
member.summary: Define if Y input is greater, less or equal to Y_CalcKill.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.Comparators.ICompare.CompareInputAgainstCalcKill(System.Double,System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Compares the with the .
member.param: The Y input in the Json File.
The Y CalcKill ARRAY in the ADTL.
Kill when it is true or EDC when is false.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.Comparators.ICompare.CompareInputAgainstCalcKill(System.Double,System.Double,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Overloaded to give comparator term.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables
member.summary: Contains Kill Mode variables.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Verifies Kill and Predict Mode variables from Json file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.FailFlags
member.summary: Gets or sets the Fail Flag that shows Measured value and the CalcKill value comparison result. It takes the next values: 0->Fail, 1->Pass, 2->EDC Fail, 8->Invalid calculation and 9->Skip testing due to set up problem.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.AboveKillLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the CalcKill Final Value as KillLimit that compares against the value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.BelowKillLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the CalcKill Final Value as KillLimit that compares against the value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.VminData
member.summary: Gets or sets the measured value concatenated to be printed in console and Ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.IdvData
member.summary: Gets or sets the measured value concatenated to be printed in console and Ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.X
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether X data is initialized or not.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.X1
member.summary: Gets or sets the array of doubles with the X1 values to calculate the kill limit.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.Y
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Y data is initialized or not.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.Y1
member.summary: Gets or sets the measured values from Json File as an array of doubles.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.AboveCalcKill
member.summary: Gets or sets the calcKill value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.AboveCalcKillNormalized
member.summary: Gets or sets the calcKill value normalized.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.BelowCalcKill
member.summary: Gets or sets the calcKill value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.BelowCalcKillNormalized
member.summary: Gets or sets the calcKill value normalized.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.BestFit
member.summary: Gets or sets the best fit line inputted by user.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.FailPortResult
member.summary: Gets or sets the fail port result of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.KillModeVariables.SkipTesting
member.summary: Gets or sets the Skip Testing Flag.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.PortResultHelper
member.summary: Generates and stores tokens for top sigmas in AGG_Tokens and sigmas for individual vmin search tests.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.PortResultHelper.finalPort
member.summary: Init current port.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.PortResultHelper.PortList
member.summary: Gets or sets list of ports collected throughout all vmin tests.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.PortResultHelper.PopulatePortList(Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.FailFlag)
member.summary: Adds Ports to List and compares inputPort (current port) to items in list.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.PortResultHelper.ClearFinalPortList
member.summary: Clear Port List.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.PortResultHelper.FinalPort
member.summary: Calculates final port across all tests.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.SigmaTokenHelper
member.summary: Generates and stores tokens for top sigmas in AGG_Tokens and sigmas for individual vmin search tests.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.SigmaTokenHelper.currSigma
member.summary: Init current sigma.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.SigmaTokenHelper.SigmaList
member.summary: Gets or sets sigmas for either AGG_Tokens or individual vmin search tests.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.SigmaTokenHelper.PopulateAggSigmas(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: This method will first check if the input already exists in the SigmaList dictionary. If not, it will create a key for it. If the input already exists in the dictionary, compare its sigma with the current inputSigma for that AGG token, does this for MIN and MAX.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.SigmaTokenHelper.PopulateAggSigmas(System.String)
member.summary: This method will first check if the input already exists in the SigmaList dictionary. If not, it will create a key for it. If the input already exists in the dictionary, compare its sigma with the current inputSigma for that AGG token, does this for MIN and MAX.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.SigmaTokenHelper.GetCurrSigma
member.summary: Return current sigma for test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.SigmaTokenHelper.ClearCurrSigma
member.summary: clears current sigma for next test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.SigmaTokenHelper.AdtlMax
member.summary: Calculates ADTL MAX across all tests.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.SigmaTokenHelper.AdtlMin
member.summary: Calculates ADTL MIN across all tests.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.StringHelper
member.summary: Extension to help in common string operations.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.ModesClasses.StringHelper.ConcatenateToString(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Concatenate into with a '_' as a delimiter.
member.param: New portion string to be added in .

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.FailFlag
member.summary: The fail flag contains 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8 and 9.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.FailFlag.Fail
member.summary: When the calculation fails (soft fail, GSDS token not found)

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.FailFlag.Pass
member.summary: When the comparison passes (measured is within kill limit(s))

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.FailFlag.AboveFail
member.summary: When measured is above kill line

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.FailFlag.BelowFail
member.summary: When measured is below kill line

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.FailFlag.BothFail
member.summary: When at least one test has failed for below, and another has failed for above

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.FailFlag.EDCFailAbove
member.summary: When above fail, but KILL mode is off (EDC MODE)

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.FailFlag.EDCFailBelow
member.summary: When below fail, but KILL mode is off (EDC MODE)

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.FailFlag.Invalid
member.summary: When the calculation is invalid - ex: log calculation is invalid, could be caused by invalid input value. Does not define FailPort, just prints.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.FailFlag.SkipTesting
member.summary: When there are setup problem - user gives incorrect value in json file. Does not define FailPort, just prints.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.ConfigFile
member.summary: Gets or sets Name of the screen tests file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.Resolution
member.summary: Gets or sets the Resolution to be used as input for Vmin calculation.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.YMinMax
member.summary: Gets or sets the Y Min and Max values check for invalidity.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.XMinMax
member.summary: Gets or sets the X Min and Max values check for invalidity.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.PrintPriorityGSDS
member.summary: Gets or sets the X Min and Max values check for invalidity.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.PrintSigmas
member.summary: Gets or sets the X Min and Max values check for invalidity.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.PrimeSortAdtlTestMethod.Execute
member.summary: Execute the method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test
member.summary: This is vector based equation storage where X and Y are always a shared storage the slope and intercept are arrays. All of them will hold the same number of element at all times.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the Name of test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.TestName
member.summary: Gets or sets the TestName for tracking purposes, DUMMY Variable, never used.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.AggToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the AggToken value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.Y1
member.summary: Gets or sets the Y1 point to compare against. Y1 must be defined.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.Y1a
member.summary: Gets or sets the alternative Y1 point to compare against. Optional.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.X1
member.summary: Gets or sets the X1 point to be used to calculate Y1. X1 must be defined.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.X1a
member.summary: Gets or sets the alternative X1 point to be used to calculate Y1. Optional.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.CompareTerm
member.summary: Gets or sets the comparator. Acceptable entries: "=" (ABOVE), (BELOW), or (BOTH).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.M
member.summary: Gets or sets the slope vector. M must be defined.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.B
member.summary: Gets or sets the intercept vector. B must be defined.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.AboveKillOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the AboveKillOffset.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.BelowKillOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the BelowKillOffset.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.VectorSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the expected vector size.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.ExpandedVectorSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the expected vector size.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.Kill
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to kill or monitor.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.MaxValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the Maximum allowed value for the calculated result.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.MinValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the Minimum allowed value for the calculated result.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.StepSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the StepSize value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SortAdtl.Test.Priority
member.summary: Gets or sets priority value of test.
